    │─────────────────────────────►│                           │
    │                              │  sudden_drift(seed=42,    │
    │                              │    n_points=200)          │
    │                              │──────────────────────────►│
    │                              │              base uses exponential
    │                              │              trend; drift injected
    │                              │◄──────────────────────────│
    │                              │  (DataFrame, meta)        │
    │◄─────────────────────────────│                           │
    │  200 {"data":[…],"meta":{…}} │                           │
    │                              │                           │
```

## Component Responsibilities

| Component | Responsibility |
|-----------|---------------|
| `src/config/config.yml` | Single source of defaults; `trend` is the primary runtime knob |
| `DriftGenerator` | Pure, typed, seeded generator; returns `(DataFrame, metadata)` |
| `api.py` (FastAPI) | Thin HTTP layer over `DriftGenerator`; exposes Swagger UI |
| `_AppState` | Singleton that holds the mutable generator so PATCH effects persist |
| `test_datasets.py` | TDD tests against injected ground truth (Principle II) |
| `test_api.py` | TestClient tests for all HTTP endpoints |

## Drift Types Quick Reference

| Method | What changes | Key parameters |
|--------|-------------|----------------|
| `sudden_drift` | Abrupt mean shift | `drift_point`, `magnitude` |
| `gradual_drift` | Slow linear ramp | `drift_start`, `drift_end`, `magnitude` |
| `incremental_drift` | Growing trend slope | `drift_start`, `slope` |
| `seasonal_drift` | Seasonal amplitude | `change_point`, `amplitude_before/after` |
| `recurring_drift` | Periodic drift windows | `period`, `duration`, `magnitude` |
| `covariate_drift` | Exogenous variable distribution | `drift_point`, `covariate_magnitude` |
| `concept_drift` | Feature→target relationship | `change_point`, `coef_before/after` |

flowchart TD
    subgraph Config["⚙️ Configuration Layer"]
        CFG["src/config/config.yml\n─────────────────\ntrend: linear\nn_points: 365\nseed: 42\nnoise_std: 1.0\n+ per-drift-type defaults"]
    end

    subgraph API["🌐 FastAPI Runtime Layer\nsrc/ailf/pipelines/drift/api.py"]
        direction TB
        EP_GET["GET /drift/config\nRead active config"]
        EP_PATCH["PATCH /drift/config/trend\nUpdate trend at runtime"]
        EP_POST["POST /drift/generate/{drift_type}\nGenerate dataset"]
        SWAGGER["Swagger UI /docs\nOpenAPI /openapi.json"]
        STATE["_AppState singleton\n(mutable DriftGenerator)"]

        EP_GET --> STATE
        EP_PATCH --> STATE
        EP_POST --> STATE
        SWAGGER -. "auto-generated" .-> EP_GET
        SWAGGER -. "auto-generated" .-> EP_PATCH
        SWAGGER -. "auto-generated" .-> EP_POST
    end

    subgraph Generator["🔬 DriftGenerator\nsrc/ailf/pipelines/drift/datasets.py"]
        direction TB
        INIT["__init__(config_path, trend)\nLoads YAML → validates trend"]
        SUDDEN["sudden_drift()\nAbrupt mean shift"]
        GRADUAL["gradual_drift()\nSlow ramp shift"]
        INCREMENTAL["incremental_drift()\nAdditional slope"]
        SEASONAL["seasonal_drift()\nAmplitude change"]
        RECURRING["recurring_drift()\nPeriodic windows"]
        COVARIATE["covariate_drift()\nExogenous shift"]
        CONCEPT["concept_drift()\nRelationship reversal"]
    end

    subgraph Output["📦 Output"]
        DF["DataFrame\nds: datetime  y: float\n(+ x0, x1… for covariate/concept)"]
        META["Metadata dict\nground-truth injection\nlocation + magnitude"]
    end

    subgraph Tests["🧪 Tests\ntests/pipelines/drift/"]
        T_DS["test_datasets.py\nInjects known drift → asserts\nprecision/recall proxy\nreproducibility checks"]
        T_API["test_api.py\nhttpx TestClient\nconfiguration endpoints\ngenerate endpoints\nSwagger reachability"]
    end

    CFG -->|"read at init"| INIT
    INIT --> SUDDEN & GRADUAL & INCREMENTAL & SEASONAL & RECURRING & COVARIATE & CONCEPT
    STATE -->|"holds"| INIT
    SUDDEN & GRADUAL & INCREMENTAL & SEASONAL & RECURRING & COVARIATE & CONCEPT --> DF
    SUDDEN & GRADUAL & INCREMENTAL & SEASONAL & RECURRING & COVARIATE & CONCEPT --> META

    T_DS -->|"imports"| Generator
    T_API -->|"imports"| API

    DF -->|"JSON records\nvia API"| EP_POST
    META -->|"JSON meta\nvia API"| EP_POST
```

## Component Responsibilities

| Component | Responsibility |
|-----------|---------------|
| `src/config/config.yml` | Single source of defaults; `trend` is the primary runtime knob |
| `DriftGenerator` | Pure, typed, seeded generator; returns `(DataFrame, metadata)` |
| `api.py` (FastAPI) | Thin HTTP layer over `DriftGenerator`; exposes Swagger UI |
| `_AppState` | Singleton that holds the mutable generator so PATCH effects persist |
| `test_datasets.py` | TDD tests against injected ground truth (Principle II) |
| `test_api.py` | TestClient tests for all HTTP endpoints |

## Drift Types Quick Reference

| Method | What changes | Key parameter |
|--------|-------------|---------------|
| `sudden_drift` | Abrupt mean shift | `drift_point`, `magnitude` |
| `gradual_drift` | Slow linear ramp | `drift_start`, `drift_end`, `magnitude` |
| `incremental_drift` | Growing trend slope | `drift_start`, `slope` |
| `seasonal_drift` | Seasonal amplitude | `change_point`, `amplitude_before/after` |
| `recurring_drift` | Periodic drift windows | `period`, `duration`, `magnitude` |
| `covariate_drift` | Exogenous variable distribution | `drift_point`, `covariate_magnitude` |
| `concept_drift` | Feature→target relationship | `change_point`, `coef_before/after` |

## Runtime Trend Update Flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Client
    participant API as FastAPI (api.py)
    participant State as _AppState
    participant Gen as DriftGenerator

    Client->>API: PATCH /drift/config/trend {"trend":"exponential"}
    API->>State: state.generator.trend = "exponential"
    State->>Gen: trend attribute mutated
    API-->>Client: 200 {"trend":"exponential", ...}

    Client->>API: POST /drift/generate/sudden {"seed":42,"n_points":200}
    API->>State: state.generator.sudden_drift(seed=42, n_points=200)
    State->>Gen: sudden_drift uses trend="exponential" base
    Gen-->>State: (DataFrame, meta)
    State-->>API: (DataFrame, meta)
    API-->>Client: 200 {"data":[...],"meta":{...}}
```

messages.content: SPEC-dataset.md asks to store the results after running the pipeline, which folder is the results shared

From `CLAUDE.md`:

> `data/`, `reports/` — bulk artifacts are gitignored; commit only tiny samples.

Results go into:
- **`reports/`** — explanation reports, eval outputs, pipeline run summaries
- **`data/`** — generated datasets / CSVs

Both are **gitignored** (bulk artifacts). Only commit tiny sample files for provenance.

For the drift pipeline specifically, the convention would be:
```
data/drift/          ← generated DataFrames (CSV/parquet)
reports/drift/       ← pipeline run reports, metrics, before/after comparisons
```

input.content:
"""Drift pipeline entry point.

Wires the DriftGenerator into a FastAPI application that exposes a Swagger UI
for runtime control of synthetic drift dataset generation.

Run with:
    uv run python -m ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline
or:
    PYTHONPATH=src uvicorn ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline:app --reload --port 8000

Swagger UI: http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
from typing import Any, Literal

import uvicorn
from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator

from ailf.pipelines.drift.datasets import DriftGenerator, _VALID_TRENDS

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bootstrap
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

_CONFIG_PATH = pathlib.Path(__file__).parents[3] / "config" / "config.yml"

app = FastAPI(
    title="Drift Dataset Generator API",
    description=(
        "Runtime-configurable synthetic drift dataset generator for the "
        "Agent-in-the-Loop Forecasting project.\n\n"
        "Update `trend` via **PATCH /drift/config/trend**, then call "
        "**POST /drift/generate/{drift_type}** to produce a fresh dataset."
    ),
    version="0.1.0",
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Shared mutable state — one generator per process
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class _AppState:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.generator = DriftGenerator(config_path=_CONFIG_PATH)


_state = _AppState()


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pydantic models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TrendLiteral = Literal["flat", "linear", "exponential"]


class TrendUpdate(BaseModel):
    trend: TrendLiteral

    @field_validator("trend")
    @classmethod
    def must_be_valid(cls, v: str) -> str:
        if v not in _VALID_TRENDS:
            raise ValueError(
                f"trend must be one of {sorted(_VALID_TRENDS)}, got '{v}'"
            )
        return v


class ConfigResponse(BaseModel):
    trend: str
    n_points: int
    noise_std: float
    seed: int
    start_date: str
    freq: str


class GenerateRequest(BaseModel):
    seed: int = 42
    n_points: int | None = None
    # sudden
    drift_point: int | None = None
    magnitude: float | None = None
    # gradual
    drift_start: int | None = None
    drift_end: int | None = None
    # incremental
    slope: float | None = None
    # seasonal
    season_length: int | None = None
    amplitude_before: float | None = None
    amplitude_after: float | None = None
    change_point: int | None = None
    # recurring
    period: int | None = None
    duration: int | None = None
    # covariate / concept
    n_covariates: int = 1
    covariate_magnitude: float | None = None
    coef_before: float | None = None
    coef_after: float | None = None
    # shared overrides
    noise_std: float | None = None
    start_date: str | None = None
    freq: str | None = None


class GenerateResponse(BaseModel):
    data: list[dict[str, Any]]
    meta: dict[str, Any]


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Routes — Config
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@app.get(
    "/drift/config",
    response_model=ConfigResponse,
    summary="Get current runtime configuration",
    tags=["config"],
)
def get_config() -> ConfigResponse:
    """Return the active configuration driving the drift generator."""
    gen = _state.generator
    cfg = gen._cfg  # noqa: SLF001
    return ConfigResponse(
        trend=gen.trend,
        n_points=cfg.get("n_points", 365),
        noise_std=cfg.get("noise_std", 1.0),
        seed=cfg.get("seed", 42),
        start_date=cfg.get("start_date", "2023-01-01"),
        freq=cfg.get("freq", "D"),
    )


@app.patch(
    "/drift/config/trend",
    response_model=ConfigResponse,
    summary="Update the trend at runtime",
    tags=["config"],
)
def update_trend(body: TrendUpdate) -> ConfigResponse:
    """Change the base-series trend without restarting the server.

    Valid values: `flat` · `linear` · `exponential`

    The new trend is applied immediately to all subsequent generate calls.
    """
    _state.generator.trend = body.trend
    return get_config()


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Routes — Generate
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@app.post(
    "/drift/generate/{drift_type}",
    response_model=GenerateResponse,
    summary="Generate a synthetic drift dataset",
    tags=["generate"],
)
def generate_drift(drift_type: str, body: GenerateRequest) -> GenerateResponse:
    """Generate a Prophet-compatible dataset with the specified drift type.

    **drift_type** must be one of:
    `sudden` · `gradual` · `incremental` · `seasonal` · `recurring` · `covariate` · `concept`

    All body fields are optional; defaults are read from `src/config/config.yml`.

    Response includes:
    - **data** — list of `{ds, y[, x0, x1, …]}` records (ISO date strings)
    - **meta** — ground-truth injection location and parameters
    """
    gen = _state.generator
    common: dict[str, Any] = {"seed": body.seed}
    if body.n_points   is not None: common["n_points"]   = body.n_points
    if body.noise_std  is not None: common["noise_std"]  = body.noise_std
    if body.start_date is not None: common["start_date"] = body.start_date
    if body.freq       is not None: common["freq"]       = body.freq

    if drift_type == "sudden":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.drift_point is not None: kw["drift_point"] = body.drift_point
        if body.magnitude   is not None: kw["magnitude"]   = body.magnitude
        df, meta = gen.sudden_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "gradual":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.drift_start is not None: kw["drift_start"] = body.drift_start
        if body.drift_end   is not None: kw["drift_end"]   = body.drift_end
        if body.magnitude   is not None: kw["magnitude"]   = body.magnitude
        df, meta = gen.gradual_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "incremental":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.drift_start is not None: kw["drift_start"] = body.drift_start
        if body.slope       is not None: kw["slope"]       = body.slope
        df, meta = gen.incremental_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "seasonal":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.season_length    is not None: kw["season_length"]    = body.season_length
        if body.amplitude_before is not None: kw["amplitude_before"] = body.amplitude_before
        if body.amplitude_after  is not None: kw["amplitude_after"]  = body.amplitude_after
        if body.change_point     is not None: kw["change_point"]     = body.change_point
        df, meta = gen.seasonal_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "recurring":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.period    is not None: kw["period"]    = body.period
        if body.duration  is not None: kw["duration"]  = body.duration
        if body.magnitude is not None: kw["magnitude"] = body.magnitude
        df, meta = gen.recurring_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "covariate":
        kw = {**common, "n_covariates": body.n_covariates}
        if body.drift_point         is not None: kw["drift_point"]         = body.drift_point
        if body.covariate_magnitude is not None: kw["covariate_magnitude"] = body.covariate_magnitude
        df, meta = gen.covariate_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "concept":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.change_point is not None: kw["change_point"] = body.change_point
        if body.coef_before  is not None: kw["coef_before"]  = body.coef_before
        if body.coef_after   is not None: kw["coef_after"]   = body.coef_after
        df, meta = gen.concept_drift(**kw)

    else:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=404,
            detail=(
                f"Unknown drift_type '{drift_type}'. "
                "Must be one of: sudden, gradual, incremental, seasonal, "
                "recurring, covariate, concept."
            ),
        )

    df["ds"] = df["ds"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    return GenerateResponse(data=df.to_dict(orient="records"), meta=meta)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entry point
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def main() -> None:
    """Launch the drift pipeline API server."""
    uvicorn.run(
        "ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline:app",
        host="0.0.0.0",
        port=8000,
        reload=True,
    )


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

"""Drift pipeline entry point.

Wires the DriftGenerator into a FastAPI application that exposes a Swagger UI
for runtime control of synthetic drift dataset generation.

Run with:
    uv run python -m ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline
or:
    PYTHONPATH=src uvicorn ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline:app --reload --port 8000

Swagger UI: http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import pathlib
from typing import Any, Literal

import uvicorn
from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel, field_validator

from ailf.pipelines.drift.datasets import DriftGenerator, _VALID_TRENDS

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Bootstrap
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

_CONFIG_PATH = pathlib.Path(__file__).parents[3] / "config" / "config.yml"

app = FastAPI(
    title="Drift Dataset Generator API",
    description=(
        "Runtime-configurable synthetic drift dataset generator for the "
        "Agent-in-the-Loop Forecasting project.\n\n"
        "Update `trend` via **PATCH /drift/config/trend**, then call "
        "**POST /drift/generate/{drift_type}** to produce a fresh dataset."
    ),
    version="0.1.0",
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Shared mutable state — one generator per process
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class _AppState:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.generator = DriftGenerator(config_path=_CONFIG_PATH)


_state = _AppState()


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Pydantic models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TrendLiteral = Literal["flat", "linear", "exponential"]


class TrendUpdate(BaseModel):
    trend: TrendLiteral

    @field_validator("trend")
    @classmethod
    def must_be_valid(cls, v: str) -> str:
        if v not in _VALID_TRENDS:
            raise ValueError(
                f"trend must be one of {sorted(_VALID_TRENDS)}, got '{v}'"
            )
        return v


class ConfigResponse(BaseModel):
    trend: str
    n_points: int
    noise_std: float
    seed: int
    start_date: str
    freq: str


class GenerateRequest(BaseModel):
    seed: int = 42
    n_points: int | None = None
    # sudden
    drift_point: int | None = None
    magnitude: float | None = None
    # gradual
    drift_start: int | None = None
    drift_end: int | None = None
    # incremental
    slope: float | None = None
    # seasonal
    season_length: int | None = None
    amplitude_before: float | None = None
    amplitude_after: float | None = None
    change_point: int | None = None
    # recurring
    period: int | None = None
    duration: int | None = None
    # covariate / concept
    n_covariates: int = 1
    covariate_magnitude: float | None = None
    coef_before: float | None = None
    coef_after: float | None = None
    # shared overrides
    noise_std: float | None = None
    start_date: str | None = None
    freq: str | None = None


class GenerateResponse(BaseModel):
    data: list[dict[str, Any]]
    meta: dict[str, Any]


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Routes — Config
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@app.get(
    "/drift/config",
    response_model=ConfigResponse,
    summary="Get current runtime configuration",
    tags=["config"],
)
def get_config() -> ConfigResponse:
    """Return the active configuration driving the drift generator."""
    gen = _state.generator
    cfg = gen._cfg  # noqa: SLF001
    return ConfigResponse(
        trend=gen.trend,
        n_points=cfg.get("n_points", 365),
        noise_std=cfg.get("noise_std", 1.0),
        seed=cfg.get("seed", 42),
        start_date=cfg.get("start_date", "2023-01-01"),
        freq=cfg.get("freq", "D"),
    )


@app.patch(
    "/drift/config/trend",
    response_model=ConfigResponse,
    summary="Update the trend at runtime",
    tags=["config"],
)
def update_trend(body: TrendUpdate) -> ConfigResponse:
    """Change the base-series trend without restarting the server.

    Valid values: `flat` · `linear` · `exponential`

    The new trend is applied immediately to all subsequent generate calls.
    """
    _state.generator.trend = body.trend
    return get_config()


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Routes — Generate
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@app.post(
    "/drift/generate/{drift_type}",
    response_model=GenerateResponse,
    summary="Generate a synthetic drift dataset",
    tags=["generate"],
)
def generate_drift(drift_type: str, body: GenerateRequest) -> GenerateResponse:
    """Generate a Prophet-compatible dataset with the specified drift type.

    **drift_type** must be one of:
    `sudden` · `gradual` · `incremental` · `seasonal` · `recurring` · `covariate` · `concept`

    All body fields are optional; defaults are read from `src/config/config.yml`.

    Response includes:
    - **data** — list of `{ds, y[, x0, x1, …]}` records (ISO date strings)
    - **meta** — ground-truth injection location and parameters
    """
    gen = _state.generator
    common: dict[str, Any] = {"seed": body.seed}
    if body.n_points   is not None: common["n_points"]   = body.n_points
    if body.noise_std  is not None: common["noise_std"]  = body.noise_std
    if body.start_date is not None: common["start_date"] = body.start_date
    if body.freq       is not None: common["freq"]       = body.freq

    if drift_type == "sudden":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.drift_point is not None: kw["drift_point"] = body.drift_point
        if body.magnitude   is not None: kw["magnitude"]   = body.magnitude
        df, meta = gen.sudden_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "gradual":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.drift_start is not None: kw["drift_start"] = body.drift_start
        if body.drift_end   is not None: kw["drift_end"]   = body.drift_end
        if body.magnitude   is not None: kw["magnitude"]   = body.magnitude
        df, meta = gen.gradual_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "incremental":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.drift_start is not None: kw["drift_start"] = body.drift_start
        if body.slope       is not None: kw["slope"]       = body.slope
        df, meta = gen.incremental_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "seasonal":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.season_length    is not None: kw["season_length"]    = body.season_length
        if body.amplitude_before is not None: kw["amplitude_before"] = body.amplitude_before
        if body.amplitude_after  is not None: kw["amplitude_after"]  = body.amplitude_after
        if body.change_point     is not None: kw["change_point"]     = body.change_point
        df, meta = gen.seasonal_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "recurring":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.period    is not None: kw["period"]    = body.period
        if body.duration  is not None: kw["duration"]  = body.duration
        if body.magnitude is not None: kw["magnitude"] = body.magnitude
        df, meta = gen.recurring_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "covariate":
        kw = {**common, "n_covariates": body.n_covariates}
        if body.drift_point         is not None: kw["drift_point"]         = body.drift_point
        if body.covariate_magnitude is not None: kw["covariate_magnitude"] = body.covariate_magnitude
        df, meta = gen.covariate_drift(**kw)

    elif drift_type == "concept":
        kw = {**common}
        if body.change_point is not None: kw["change_point"] = body.change_point
        if body.coef_before  is not None: kw["coef_before"]  = body.coef_before
        if body.coef_after   is not None: kw["coef_after"]   = body.coef_after
        df, meta = gen.concept_drift(**kw)

    else:
        raise HTTPException(
            status_code=404,
            detail=(
                f"Unknown drift_type '{drift_type}'. "
                "Must be one of: sudden, gradual, incremental, seasonal, "
                "recurring, covariate, concept."
            ),
        )

    df["ds"] = df["ds"].dt.strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
    return GenerateResponse(data=df.to_dict(orient="records"), meta=meta)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entry point
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

def main() -> None:
    """Launch the drift pipeline API server."""
    uvicorn.run(
        "ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline:app",
        host="0.0.0.0",
        port=8000,
        reload=True,
    )


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

import json, requests, pathlib
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8000"
OUT  = pathlib.Path("sessions/ksowmya/drift_plots")
OUT.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

SCENARIOS = [
    ("sudden",      {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"drift_point":182,"magnitude":12.0},
     {"label":"Sudden drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#e74c3c"}),
    ("gradual",     {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"drift_start":100,"drift_end":265,"magnitude":10.0},
     {"label":"Gradual drift (days 100-265)","start":100,"end":265,"color":"#e67e22"}),
    ("incremental", {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"drift_start":100,"slope":0.06},
     {"label":"Incremental drift from day 100","marker":100,"color":"#f1c40f"}),
    ("seasonal",    {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"season_length":7,
                     "amplitude_before":2.0,"amplitude_after":9.0,"change_point":182},
     {"label":"Seasonal amplitude drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#27ae60"}),
    ("recurring",   {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"period":73,"duration":20,"magnitude":8.0},
     {"label":"Recurring drift every 73 days","color":"#2980b9"}),
    ("covariate",   {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"n_covariates":1,"drift_point":182},
     {"label":"Covariate distribution drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#8e44ad"}),
    ("concept",     {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"change_point":182,
                     "coef_before":3.0,"coef_after":-3.0},
     {"label":"Concept drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#c0392b"}),
]

errors = []
successes = []

for drift_type, payload, viz in SCENARIOS:
    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE}/drift/generate/{drift_type}", json=payload, timeout=10)
    if resp.status_code != 200:
        errors.append(f"{drift_type}: HTTP {resp.status_code} — {resp.text[:200]}")
        continue

    body = resp.json()
    df   = pd.DataFrame(body["data"])
    meta = body["meta"]
    df["ds"] = pd.to_datetime(df["ds"])

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
    ax.plot(df["ds"], df["y"], lw=1.2, color=viz["color"], alpha=0.85, label="y")

    # Annotate injection region
    if "marker" in viz:
        ax.axvline(df["ds"].iloc[viz["marker"]], color="black", ls="--", lw=1.2,
                   label=f"drift point (day {viz['marker']})")
    if "start" in viz and "end" in viz:
        ax.axvspan(df["ds"].iloc[viz["start"]], df["ds"].iloc[viz["end"]-1],
                   alpha=0.15, color="orange", label="drift window")

    # Overlay covariate x0 if present
    if "x0" in df.columns:
        ax2 = ax.twinx()
        ax2.plot(df["ds"], df["x0"], lw=0.8, color="grey", alpha=0.5, ls=":")
        ax2.set_ylabel("x0 (covariate)", fontsize=8, color="grey")

    ax.set_title(f"{drift_type.upper()} DRIFT  —  {viz['label']}", fontsize=12, fontweight="bold")
    ax.set_xlabel("Date")
    ax.set_ylabel("y")
    ax.legend(fontsize=8, loc="upper left")

    # Meta box
    meta_str = "\n".join(f"{k}: {v}" for k, v in meta.items() if k != "drift_windows")
    if "drift_windows" in meta:
        meta_str += f"\ndrift_windows: {len(meta['drift_windows'])} windows"
    ax.text(0.99, 0.97, meta_str, transform=ax.transAxes,
            fontsize=7, va="top", ha="right",
            bbox=dict(boxstyle="round,pad=0.3", fc="white", alpha=0.8))

    fig.tight_layout()
    out_path = OUT / f"{drift_type}_drift.png"
    fig.savefig(out_path, dpi=150)
    plt.close(fig)
    successes.append(f"  ✓  {drift_type:12s} → {out_path}")
    print(f"[OK] {drift_type}")

print("\n--- Summary ---")
for s in successes: print(s)
if errors:
    print("\n--- ERRORS ---")
    for e in errors: print(" ✗ ", e)
    raise SystemExit(1)
EOF

input.command:
PYTHONPATH=src python3 - << 'EOF'
import json, requests, pathlib
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8000"
OUT  = pathlib.Path("sessions/ksowmya/drift_plots")
OUT.mkdir(exist_ok=True)

SCENARIOS = [
    ("sudden",      {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"drift_point":182,"magnitude":12.0},
     {"label":"Sudden drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#e74c3c"}),
    ("gradual",     {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"drift_start":100,"drift_end":265,"magnitude":10.0},
     {"label":"Gradual drift (days 100-265)","start":100,"end":265,"color":"#e67e22"}),
    ("incremental", {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"drift_start":100,"slope":0.06},
     {"label":"Incremental drift from day 100","marker":100,"color":"#f1c40f"}),
    ("seasonal",    {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"season_length":7,
                     "amplitude_before":2.0,"amplitude_after":9.0,"change_point":182},
     {"label":"Seasonal amplitude drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#27ae60"}),
    ("recurring",   {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"period":73,"duration":20,"magnitude":8.0},
     {"label":"Recurring drift every 73 days","color":"#2980b9"}),
    ("covariate",   {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"n_covariates":1,"drift_point":182},
     {"label":"Covariate distribution drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#8e44ad"}),
    ("concept",     {"seed":42,"n_points":365,"change_point":182,
                     "coef_before":3.0,"coef_after":-3.0},
     {"label":"Concept drift at day 182","marker":182,"color":"#c0392b"}),
]

errors = []
successes = []

for drift_type, payload, viz in SCENARIOS:
    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE}/drift/generate/{drift_type}", json=payload, timeout=10)
    if resp.status_code != 200:
        errors.append(f"{drift_type}: HTTP {resp.status_code} — {resp.text[:200]}")
        continue

    body = resp.json()
    df   = pd.DataFrame(body["data"])
    meta = body["meta"]
    df["ds"] = pd.to_datetime(df["ds"])

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
    ax.plot(df["ds"], df["y"], lw=1.2, color=viz["color"], alpha=0.85, label="y")

    # Annotate injection region
    if "marker" in viz:
        ax.axvline(df["ds"].iloc[viz["marker"]], color="black", ls="--", lw=1.2,
                   label=f"drift point (day {viz['marker']})")
    if "start" in viz and "end" in viz:
        ax.axvspan(df["ds"].iloc[viz["start"]], df["ds"].iloc[viz["end"]-1],
                   alpha=0.15, color="orange", label="drift window")

    # Overlay covariate x0 if present
    if "x0" in df.columns:
        ax2 = ax.twinx()
        ax2.plot(df["ds"], df["x0"], lw=0.8, color="grey", alpha=0.5, ls=":")
        ax2.set_ylabel("x0 (covariate)", fontsize=8, color="grey")

    ax.set_title(f"{drift_type.upper()} DRIFT  —  {viz['label']}", fontsize=12, fontweight="bold")
    ax.set_xlabel("Date")
    ax.set_ylabel("y")
    ax.legend(fontsize=8, loc="upper left")

    # Meta box
    meta_str = "\n".join(f"{k}: {v}" for k, v in meta.items() if k != "drift_windows")
    if "drift_windows" in meta:
        meta_str += f"\ndrift_windows: {len(meta['drift_windows'])} windows"
    ax.text(0.99, 0.97, meta_str, transform=ax.transAxes,
            fontsize=7, va="top", ha="right",
            bbox=dict(boxstyle="round,pad=0.3", fc="white", alpha=0.8))

    fig.tight_layout()
    out_path = OUT / f"{drift_type}_drift.png"
    fig.savefig(out_path, dpi=150)
    plt.close(fig)
    successes.append(f"  ✓  {drift_type:12s} → {out_path}")
    print(f"[OK] {drift_type}")

print("\n--- Summary ---")
for s in successes: print(s)
if errors:
    print("\n--- ERRORS ---")
    for e in errors: print(" ✗ ", e)
    raise SystemExit(1)
EOF

input.content:
# Session Log — ksowmya

**Date:** 2026-06-14  
**Branch:** `ksowmya`  
**Session focus:** Phase 1 — Drift Synthetic Dataset Generator  
**Tool:** Wibey JetBrains Plugin (Claude Sonnet 4.6)

---

## Conversation Summary

### 1. SPEC Review
- Read `sessions/ksowmya/SPEC-dataset.md` and `SPEC.md` to understand requirements.
- Identified 5 deliverables: DriftGenerator, FastAPI runtime API, `requirements.txt`, README, pytest tests.
- Called advisor before writing any code — surfaced key constraints:
  - `SiD2ReGenerator` not found on PyPI → fall back to Darts/numpy/pandas (constitution §Tech)
  - No separate `requirements.txt` via pip — use `uv`; generate via compile if needed
  - TDD is **non-negotiable** (constitution Principle II)
  - FastAPI must live inside `src/ailf/pipelines/drift/`

---

### 2. Files Created

#### `src/config/config.yml`
- Central configuration with `trend` (flat | linear | exponential), `n_points`, `seed`, `noise_std`, `start_date`, `freq`
- Per-drift-type defaults for all 7 methods: `sudden`, `gradual`, `incremental`, `seasonal`, `recurring`, `covariate`, `concept`

#### `tests/pipelines/drift/test_datasets.py` *(written FIRST — TDD)*
- 30+ tests across 8 test classes
- Each test injects drift at a known location and asserts detection via `_mean_shift_detected()` (mean shift > 2σ proxy)
- Reproducibility tests (same seed → identical output)
- Schema validation (`ds` datetime, `y` float)
- `meta` key presence checks

#### `src/ailf/pipelines/drift/datasets.py`
- `DriftGenerator` class — reads `trend` from `config.yml` at init
- 7 methods: `sudden_drift`, `gradual_drift`, `incremental_drift`, `seasonal_drift`, `recurring_drift`, `covariate_drift`, `concept_drift`
- All methods: accept `seed` param, use local `np.random.default_rng(seed)`, return `(DataFrame, dict)` with ground-truth metadata
- Mutable `.trend` attribute for runtime mutation by the API layer

#### `tests/pipelines/drift/test_api.py` *(written FIRST — TDD)*
- httpx `TestClient` tests for all HTTP endpoints
- Config GET/PATCH, generate POST for all 7 drift types
- Invalid drift type → 404, invalid trend → 422
- Swagger `/docs` reachability
- Reproducibility via API (same seed → same JSON)
- Trend-affects-output test

#### `src/ailf/pipelines/drift/pipeline.py` *(moved from api.py per updated SPEC)*
- FastAPI `app` with Swagger UI at `/docs`
- `GET /drift/config` — read active config
- `PATCH /drift/config/trend` — update trend at runtime (no restart needed)
- `POST /drift/generate/{drift_type}` — generate dataset
- `_AppState` singleton holds mutable `DriftGenerator`
- `main()` launches uvicorn — module is the pipeline entry point

#### `sessions/ksowmya/architecture-phase1.md`
- Mermaid `flowchart TD` — full system diagram (Config → Generator → Output → API → Tests)
- Mermaid `sequenceDiagram` — runtime trend update flow (Client → API → State → Generator)

#### `sessions/ksowmya/README.md`
- Setup instructions (`uv sync` / `pip install -r requirements.txt`)
- Server startup command
- API usage examples (curl + Swagger)
- Python direct usage examples
- Test run commands
- Design decisions table
- Full `config.yml` reference

#### `requirements.txt`
- Pinned to actual installed versions (fastapi==0.136.1, uvicorn==0.37.0, starlette==1.0.0, numpy==2.4.1, pandas==2.3.3, …)
- `uv.lock` remains canonical; `requirements.txt` for pip compatibility

---

### 3. Key Decisions & Rationale

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| `SiD2ReGenerator` skipped | Not on PyPI; constitution mandates Darts stack |
| Tests written before implementation | Constitution Principle II — non-negotiable |
| `(DataFrame, metadata)` return type | Ground truth enables precision/recall eval downstream |
| Local `np.random.default_rng(seed)` | No global RNG state; independent reproducibility per call |
| FastAPI in `pipeline.py` (not `api.py`) | Updated SPEC-dataset.md specifies `pipeline.py` as the home |
| Mutable `.trend` on generator | API PATCH mutates in-process; no file I/O on each request |
| `_AppState` singleton | One generator per process; PATCH effects persist across requests |

---

### 4. SPEC Update (mid-session)

SPEC-dataset.md was updated during the session. The only material change:  
> FastAPI moved from `api.py` → `pipeline.py`

Changes made in response:
- Moved full `app` definition into `pipeline.py`
- `api.py` deleted (was empty after move)
- `tests/pipelines/drift/test_api.py` import updated: `from ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline import app`
- `architecture-phase1.md` and `README.md` references updated
- `requirements.txt` version floors corrected to actual installed versions

---

### 5. Server Verification

```
PYTHONPATH=src nohup python3 -m uvicorn ailf.pipelines.drift.pipeline:app \

# Session Log — ksowmya

**Date:** 2026-06-14  
**Branch:** `ksowmya`  
**Session focus:** Phase 1 — Drift Synthetic Dataset Generator  
**Tool:** Wibey JetBrains Plugin (Claude Sonnet 4.6)

---

## Conversation Summary

### 1. SPEC Review
- Read `sessions/ksowmya/SPEC-dataset.md` and `SPEC.md` to understand requirements.
- Identified 5 deliverables: DriftGenerator, FastAPI runtime API, `requirements.txt`, README, pytest tests.
- Called advisor before writing any code — surfaced key constraints:
  - `SiD2ReGenerator` not found on PyPI → fall back to Darts/numpy/pandas (constitution §Tech)
  - No separate `requirements.txt` via pip — use `uv`; generate via compile if needed
  - TDD is **non-negotiable** (constitution Principle II)
  - FastAPI must live inside `src/ailf/pipelines/drift/`

---

### 2. Files Created

#### `src/config/config.yml`
- Central configuration with `trend` (flat | linear | exponential), `n_points`, `seed`, `noise_std`, `start_date`, `freq`
- Per-drift-type defaults for all 7 methods: `sudden`, `gradual`, `incremental`, `seasonal`, `recurring`, `covariate`, `concept`

#### `tests/pipelines/drift/test_datasets.py` *(written FIRST — TDD)*
- 30+ tests across 8 test classes
- Each test injects drift at a known location and asserts detection via `_mean_shift_detected()` (mean shift > 2σ proxy)
- Reproducibility tests (same seed → identical output)
- Schema validation (`ds` datetime, `y` float)
- `meta` key presence checks

#### `src/ailf/pipelines/drift/datasets.py`
- `DriftGenerator` class — reads `trend` from `config.yml` at init
- 7 methods: `sudden_drift`, `gradual_drift`, `incremental_drift`, `seasonal_drift`, `recurring_drift`, `covariate_drift`, `concept_drift`
- All methods: accept `seed` param, use local `np.random.default_rng(seed)`, return `(DataFrame, dict)` with ground-truth metadata
- Mutable `.trend` attribute for runtime mutation by the API layer

#### `tests/pipelines/drift/test_api.py` *(written FIRST — TDD)*
- httpx `TestClient` tests for all HTTP endpoints
- Config GET/PATCH, generate POST for all 7 drift types
- Invalid drift type → 404, invalid trend → 422
- Swagger `/docs` reachability
- Reproducibility via API (same seed → same JSON)
- Trend-affects-output test

#### `src/ailf/pipelines/drift/pipeline.py` *(moved from api.py per updated SPEC)*
- FastAPI `app` with Swagger UI at `/docs`
- `GET /drift/config` — read active config
- `PATCH /drift/config/trend` — update trend at runtime (no restart needed)
- `POST /drift/generate/{drift_type}` — generate dataset
- `_AppState` singleton holds mutable `DriftGenerator`
- `main()` launches uvicorn — module is the pipeline entry point

#### `sessions/ksowmya/architecture-phase1.md`
- Mermaid `flowchart TD` — full system diagram (Config → Generator → Output → API → Tests)
- Mermaid `sequenceDiagram` — runtime trend update flow (Client → API → State → Generator)

#### `sessions/ksowmya/README.md`
- Setup instructions (`uv sync` / `pip install -r requirements.txt`)
- Server startup command
- API usage examples (curl + Swagger)
- Python direct usage examples
- Test run commands
- Design decisions table
- Full `config.yml` reference

#### `requirements.txt`
- Pinned to actual installed versions (fastapi==0.136.1, uvicorn==0.37.0, starlette==1.0.0, numpy==2.4.1, pandas==2.3.3, …)
- `uv.lock` remains canonical; `requirements.txt` for pip compatibility

---

### 3. Key Decisions & Rationale

| Decision | Rationale |
|----------|-----------|
| `SiD2ReGenerator` skipped | Not on PyPI; constitution mandates Darts stack |
| Tests written before implementation | Constitution Principle II — non-negotiable |
| `(DataFrame, metadata)` return type | Ground truth enables precision/recall eval downstream |
| Local `np.random.default_rng(seed)` | No global RNG state; independent reproducibility per call |
| FastAPI in `pipeline.py` (not `api.py`) | Updated SPEC-dataset.md specifies `pipeline.py` as the home |
| Mutable `.trend` on generator | API PATCH mutates in-process; no file I/O on each request |
| `_AppState` singleton | One generator per process; PATCH effects persist across requests |

---

### 4. SPEC Update (mid-session)

SPEC-dataset.md was updated during the session. The only material change:  
> FastAPI moved from `api.py` → `pipeline.py`
